name: codech-mockup-design
description: Structured design ideation and visual prototyping workflow. Creates design system documents and self-contained HTML showcases that render live in any browser. Actions: design, prototype, mockup, create design system, explore visual directions, build showcase. Projects: landing page, dashboard, mobile app, SaaS, marketplace, portfolio, admin panel, e-commerce. Elements: color system, typography, spacing, motion, components, accessibility. Supports multiple design directions with 7-axis differentiation and optional interactive Framer Motion + shadcn/ui prototypes.
